title: Sample Coordinator - Bioanalytical
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Performs any combination of sample accession tasks, including opening, entering, tracking, labeling, shipping and disposition of samples. 
  • Reviews sample inventory against samples to ensure accuracy and communicate discrepancies.
  • Communicates confirmation of sample receipt to clients, if appropriate. 
  • Distributes sample information and paperwork.
  • Manage reference standards and blank matrix in system as needed.
  • Solves problems independently, contacting internal or external clients for clarification as needed.
  • Handles internal and external customer inquiries and requests
  • Approved as an authorized environmental system monitor and after hours responder. 
  • Assists in maintaining the logbooks, if appropriate, for the department and ensures accuracy of information they contain.
  • Certified to be an “after hours sample receipt” team member, as appropriate.
  • Participates on teams and committees representing the sample management group.
  • Participates in client visits as needed, assists in communicating technical information.
  • Assist Management with responding to QAU, client and regulatory questions.
  • Work with procurement to order lab supply for the studies.
  • Maintains a clean and safe laboratory work environment.
  • Participates in process improvement initiatives.
  • May assists in writing text for SOP, protocols, methods or reports.
  • Contributes towards a cohesive team environment.
  • Introduces and develops improvement ideas for the group, working with management.
  • Performs other related duties as assigned.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor of Science/Arts (BS/BA) degree in chemistry, logistic, supply chain or related field.
  • Experience may be substituted for education.
  • Ability to perform basic computer skills (e.g., Word, Excel).
  • Expectations to liaise with China counterparts, proficiency in Chinese is advantageous

postedCompany.description:
LABCORP DEVELOPMENT (ASIA) PTE. LTD.

At Labcorp, we believe in the power of science to change lives. We are a leading global life sciences company that delivers answers for crucial health questions —because we know that knowledge has the potential to make life better for all.


Through our unparalleled diagnostics and drug development capabilities, we provide insights and accelerate innovations that not only empower patients and providers but help medical, biotech, and pharmaceutical companies transform ideas into innovations. 


Here, you can join our more than 70,000 employees, serving clients in more than 100 countries, as we work together to make a real impact on people’s lives. Join us in our pursuit of answers.
